## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. What problem does this PR solve?

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New model / algorithm
- [ ] Feature engineering improvement
- [ ] UI/UX enhancement (Streamlit)
- [ ] Data preparation / preprocessing
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Areas Affected

- [ ] Model training (`train_dashboard_models.py`)
- [ ] Prediction / inference (`streamlit_app.py`)
- [ ] Data preparation (`prepare_ml_data.py`)
- [ ] Hyperparameter tuning (`tune_hyperparameters.py`)
- [ ] Notebooks
- [ ] Dataset files

## Testing

- [ ] `python test_helpers.py` — tests pass
- [ ] All existing models can be loaded and used
- [ ] Streamlit app loads without errors
- [ ] Predictions are generated correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing project conventions and style
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have verified the model files (.pkl) are properly gitignored
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have verified prediction accuracy is maintained (or improved)
